speaker: speaker1
text: I wonder what he looks like . Oh , I can't wait to see him ! His email said he'd be wearing a white hat . ( looking around for him ) oh , there is .

speaker: speaker1
text: Logan ! Why on earth are you hiding here ? White hat ! Come on ! Don't tell me you're the guy ! It can't be true .

speaker: speaker1
text: What a bummer ! You set me up ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Let me explain . I didn't mean to hurt you ...

speaker: speaker1
text: How dare you ! ( starts to walk off )

speaker: speaker2
text: Hang on one second . Hear me out , just this once , Isabella !

speaker: speaker1
text: Why did you lie to me in the email ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I didn't lie . You just didn't ask me my real name .

speaker: speaker1
text: I should have known it was you . No wonder all the 20 questions were answered correctly . I thought I might have found the one for me .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm sorry . It was cruel of me . But I promise it will never happen again ? Look , there's a nice restaurant . Let me take you to dinner and we can talk things over .
